name: bids-write
description: Write a BIDS-compliant dataset to disk from classified series and configuration

volumes.description: NIfTI volume files to include in the dataset

mappings.description: Classified series mappings with BIDS paths and metadata

config.description: Reference to the workflow context containing dataset metadata (name, outputDir, license, authors, readme, bidsVersion)

bids_dir.description: Path to the written BIDS dataset directory

files_copied.description: Number of files written to the dataset
